sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong sapsap hang Khris tawh kigamla semsem,
Tudong mahin nial lailai ding na hiam?
Leitung
nopsakna lam-en lailai ding maw?
Hong khem hihte muang lailai ding na
hiam?

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Jesuh zuan meng in! sinkham, lungkham mi aw,
Jesuh zuan in, hun omlai
in;
Nang hong sang dingin tu-in hong ngak lai hi
Tuni’n hong sam, A aw ngai
in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hon hoih napi Khris tawh kigamla semsem,
Zan hong naita nang bang cih ding na
hiam?
Khris tawh na kigamlat hang, omna omlai,
Nang ading hinna tui luang hilo
hiam?

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong zolzol hang Khris tawh kigamla semsem,
Na mawhna pan na kisikkik nop
leh;
Amah’n hong ngak hotkhiatna kong khakpi ah,
Hong maisak nuamin hong ngakngak lai
veh.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hong it napi Khris tawh kigamla semsem,
Ama itna sang pak lo ding na
hiam?
Kinawh meng in, na upna aksi taanlai,
Kisikkikin umpah lo ding na hiam?
